name: C-2 control mapping: post-update controls.yaml remains a valid YAML sequence (array) per the §16 C-2 shape
command:
printf -- '- framework: soc2
  control_id: CC1.1
  legal_review_status: pending
' > controls.yaml && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/legal-review-mark.sh" --framework soc2 --control-id CC1.1 --reviewer counsel --date 2026-05-04 --controls-file controls.yaml 2>/dev/null && ruby -ryaml -e 'doc=YAML.load_file("controls.yaml"); exit(doc.is_a?(Array) ? 0 : 1)' && echo array_shape 1>&2
